scripts.prebuild: (npm run brand || echo 'brand skipped (manifest unavailable — using committed retold.brand block)') && node ./node_modules/pict-section-flow/scripts/generate-card-help.js ./docs/card-help ./source/card-help-content.js
scripts.build: npx quack build && node build/build-codemirror-bundle.js && npx quack copy

brand.Name: Ultravisor
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-ultravisor-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#cc8821"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-ultravisor-filled-light)"><path d="M 48.00,12.00 L 79.18,30.00 L 79.18,66.00 L 48.00,84.00 L 16.82,66.00 L 16.82,30.00 Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="24" fill="#5a9ec0"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="56" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">U</text>
	</svg>
brand.Favicon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="fav-ultravisor-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#cc8821"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#fav-ultravisor-light)"><path d="M 48.00,12.00 L 79.18,30.00 L 79.18,66.00 L 48.00,84.00 L 16.82,66.00 L 16.82,30.00 Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.22)"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="60" font-weight="800"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">U</text>
	</svg>

		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
